_comment: Catalst v8 — Founder Archetype lookup. Keyed by `${houseSlug}-${dominantMotiveSlug}`. Dominant motive = highest among achievement|affiliation|power (computed in S11 from ForgeProfile). Fallback key: `${houseSlug}-any`.

architects-achievement.name: The Master Builder
architects-achievement.pullQuote: You ship because the work outlasts the applause.

twinIndian.name: Sridhar Vembu
twinIndian.whyQuote: Builds for decades, from a village

architects-affiliation.name: The Systems Philosopher
architects-affiliation.pullQuote: You see the lattice others miss.

twinIndian.name: Nikhil Kamath
twinIndian.whyQuote: Builds for the long, quiet compound

architects-power.name: The Blueprinter
architects-power.pullQuote: You draw in decades, not quarters.

twinGlobal.name: Demis Hassabis
twinGlobal.whyQuote: Plays the longest game in tech

twinIndian.name: Bhavish Aggarwal
twinIndian.whyQuote: Stakes flags before the ground's ready

twinGlobal.name: Jeff Bezos
